scripts.deploy: npm run build && aws s3 sync dist/ s3://chaintng.com/s2o/ --delete --exclude 'index.html' --cache-control 'public,max-age=31536000,immutable' && aws s3 cp dist/index.html s3://chaintng.com/s2o/index.html --content-type 'text/html; charset=utf-8' --cache-control 'no-cache, no-store, must-revalidate'
